mapper.select: SELECT id, name, meal_type, price, calories, carbohydrate, protein, fat, image_url FROM meal_table ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, name, meal_type, price, calories, carbohydrate, protein, fat, image_url FROM meal_table WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meal_table ( name, meal_type, price, calories, carbohydrate, protein, fat, image_url ) VALUES ( #{name}, IFNULL(#{mealType}, 'PRODUCT'), #{price}, #{calories}, #{carbohydrate}, #{protein}, #{fat}, #{imageUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, meal_type, price, calories, carbohydrate, protein, fat, image_url, 0 AS total_order_count FROM meal_table WHERE meal_type = 'PRODUCT' ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, name, meal_type, price, calories, carbohydrate, protein, fat, image_url, 0 AS total_order_count FROM meal_table WHERE meal_type = 'PRODUCT' AND image_url IS NOT NULL AND image_url != '' ORDER BY MD5(CONCAT(CURDATE(), id)) LIMIT 1

SELECT m.id, m.name, m.meal_type, m.price, m.calories, m.carbohydrate, m.protein, m.fat, m.image_url, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_order_count FROM order_table o JOIN meal_table m ON o.menu_id = m.id WHERE m.meal_type = 'PRODUCT' GROUP BY m.id, m.name, m.meal_type, m.price, m.calories, m.carbohydrate, m.protein, m.fat, m.image_url ORDER BY total_order_count DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT m.id, m.name, m.meal_type, m.price, m.calories, m.carbohydrate, m.protein, m.fat, m.image_url, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_order_count FROM ( SELECT menu_id, quantity, order_time FROM order_table
UNION ALL
SELECT COALESCE(mon, tue, wed, thu, fri, sat, sun) AS menu_id, quantity, order_time FROM subscript_order_table WHERE COALESCE(mon, tue, wed, thu, fri, sat, sun) IS NOT NULL ) o JOIN meal_table m ON o.menu_id = m.id WHERE m.meal_type = 'PRODUCT' AND o.order_time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY m.id, m.name, m.meal_type, m.price, m.calories, m.carbohydrate, m.protein, m.fat, m.image_url ORDER BY total_order_count DESC, m.id ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT m.id, m.name, m.meal_type, m.price, m.calories, m.carbohydrate, m.protein, m.fat, m.image_url, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_order_count FROM order_table o JOIN user_table u ON o.user_id = u.id JOIN meal_table m ON o.menu_id = m.id WHERE u.purpose = ( SELECT purpose FROM user_table WHERE id = #{userId} ) AND m.meal_type = 'PRODUCT' AND u.purpose IS NOT NULL AND u.purpose != '' GROUP BY m.id, m.name, m.meal_type, m.price, m.calories, m.carbohydrate, m.protein, m.fat, m.image_url ORDER BY total_order_count DESC LIMIT 10
